name: Config Backup
summary: Backs up OpenClaw config to Git with SHA-256 change detection

tools.name: config_backup_run
tools.description: Back up OpenClaw config and agent workspace to Git. Copies ~/.openclaw config files into the Git repo, commits, and pushes only when content has changed (SHA-256 detection).

check_only.description: Only check for changes without committing

force.description: Force backup even if no changes detected
